headline: Tyler Technologies Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) executives said the company opened 2026 with stronger-than-expected recurring revenue growth and a sharp increase in free cash flow, supported by continued public-sector demand, expanding cloud adoption, and momentum in transaction-based offerings.
